title: Skate Troopers
description: The Skate Troopers protect the innocent against the Dorlocks, who are walking evilm, and Zorn, their leader.
quote: This will be your last cracker!
creator: Wesley Mandrake
altHero: two boys in futuristic blue and purple jumpsuits, wearing helmets that obscure their faces
alt1: the troopers prepping for a fight
alt3: a Dorlock holding up a cracker and a bright blue beverage
alt4: purple trooper kicking a Dorlock with a “Boom!” graphic
